title: Ginger Dernehl
compiled_truth: Ginger Dernehl is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-11), Ginger Dernehl sent 318 and received 1147 emails, totalling 1465 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (238), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (235), [Joseph Alamo](people/joseph-alamo) (206), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (203), [Lora Sullivan](people/lora-sullivan) (190). Mailbox folders observed: aadepartment, administrative, california, canada, compliments, deleted_items.
